scene: A single bold {{centerpiece_type}} rendered as a clean flat vector emblem, perfectly centered on a solid pure black background. The symbol uses white and light grey fill tones with dark grey to black outlines. Square canvas.
style: flat vector, bold cel-shaded, 2-3 tonal steps, thick outlines, graphic game icon
lighting: flat even lighting, no directional shadows, pure silhouette-style rendering

background.details: solid pure black (#000000) filling 100% of the canvas behind the symbol

composition: single centered emblem with clear separation from the black background, generous padding on all sides
medium: digital vector illustration, no texture, no grain
details: the symbol uses ONLY white, light grey, and dark grey to black tones — no color
thick dark outlines (3-4px equivalent) around all shapes
flat cel-shaded fill with 2-3 tonal steps of grey
clean vector edges with no anti-aliasing noise
the background is solid pure black with zero texture or variation
clear high-contrast separation between symbol and background for clean extraction
